name: URL Redirects
description: Manage permanent and temporary URL redirects for moved pages and legacy paths.
author: NodePress

settings.label: Enable redirects
settings.description: Process redirect rules on incoming requests.

settings.label: Case-sensitive matching
settings.description: Match paths with exact letter casing.

settings.label: Default redirect status
settings.description: HTTP status used when a rule omits status.

settings.label: Redirect rules (JSON)
settings.description: JSON array. Each rule: from, to, optional status, optional match (exact|prefix).

settings.label: Count redirect hits
settings.description: Show redirect usage in the dashboard widget.
